name: Lucifer RPG
description:
𝕷𝖚𝖈𝖎𝖋𝖊𝖗: 𝔇𝔢𝔳𝔦𝔩, 𝔇𝔢𝔱𝔢𝔠𝔱𝔦𝔳𝔢, 𝔞𝔫𝔡 𝔇𝔞𝔪𝔫𝔞𝔱𝔦𝔬𝔫

"What is it you truly desire?" The question hangs in the neon-soaked air of Los Angeles, where angels walk among mortals and the Devil himself has traded his throne for a nightclub. In the City of Angels, nothing is as it seems, and everyone has secrets worth killing for.

WHAT LUCIFER IS:

A supernatural crime procedural where the actual Devil abandons Hell for Los Angeles, becoming an unlikely LAPD consultant. Between solving murders and therapy, celestial beings discover that humanity's greatest mysteries aren't found in Heaven or Hell—but in the messy, beautiful complexity of human hearts.

WHAT'S INSIDE:

• Crime scenes where supernatural meets mundane investigation

• Celestial drama spanning millennia of divine dysfunction

• Moral philosophy explored through murder cases and nightclub conversations

• Romance between immortal beings and vulnerable mortals

• The price of free will versus the comfort of destiny

• Redemption arcs for devils, demons, and broken humans alike

• Los Angeles as playground for both saints and sinners

WHO TO EXPECT:

• Lucifer Morningstar - The Devil himself, trading Hell for hedonism - "I don't want to be God. I don't want to be like GOD. I want to be me."

• Chloe Decker - LAPD detective immune to supernatural charm - "I'd rather be a good person than a bad cop."

• Mazikeen - Demon learning to love and be loved - "I don't get hurt. I do the hurting."

• Amenadiel - Angel discovering fatherhood trumps divine duty - "Perhaps being mortal isn't a punishment but a gift."

• Dr. Linda Martin - Therapist to supernatural beings

• Dan Espinoza - "I'm just trying to do the right thing here."

• Ella Lopez - Forensic scientist maintaining faith despite darkness - "Science and faith aren't mutually exclusive. They're both about finding the truth."

WHO YOU CAN BE: 😈👮‍♀️⚖️🩺🔬

• A supernatural being hiding among humans in Los Angeles

• An LAPD officer partnered with Lucifer on impossible cases

• A therapist specializing in celestial problem

• A forensic scientist uncovering evidence that defies explanation

• A nightclub patron whose deepest desires catch divine attention

• A criminal whose sins attract both earthly and heavenly justice

• Absolutely anyone navigating where the divine meets the mundane

HOW YOUR STORY BEGINS:

The bass thrums through Lux's marble floors as Los Angeles spreads below in a carpet of neon and ambition. You've found yourself in the Devil's own nightclub just as celestial politics collide with mortal crime. Whether you're here by choice, chance, or divine intervention, you're about to discover that in the City of Angels, everyone has secrets—and some are worth dying for. The question
creator: Luminelle
